description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, standing with arms slightly outstretched to the sides. He is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve t-shirt and straight-cut jeans, paired with athletic sneakers. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and a clean-shaven face. The clothing fits closely to the body, showing the contours of the torso and limbs. The shoes have a distinct sole and lace-up design, typical of casual urban footwear. The overall appearance is that of a casually dressed pedestrian suitable for a city or neighborhood environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing with arms out, wearing a t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers. The figure has short hair and a medium build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full details of the t-shirt and jeans.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the fit of the jeans and t-shirt from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side of the sneakers.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
